# Natural Earth Hypsometric Raster

Global hypsometric tints with shaded relief, ocean, and drainage.

## File

`HYP_HR_SR_OB_DR.tif` — 8-bit RGB, EPSG:4326 (via TFW sidecar), ~200 MB

21,600 x 10,800 pixels at 1-arcminute resolution.

## Source

- **Product**: Natural Earth 1 — Hypsometric Tints with Shaded Relief, Water, and Drainages
- **Provider**: Natural Earth (community project)
- **Website**: https://www.naturalearthdata.com/downloads/10m-raster-data/
- **Download**: https://naciscdn.org/naturalearth/10m/raster/HYP_HR_SR_OB_DR.zip

## License

Natural Earth data is in the [public domain](https://www.naturalearthdata.com/about/terms-of-use/).

No attribution required, though credit to Natural Earth is appreciated.
